---
Suite
---
!***> SetUp 
!include -seamless .HelperPages.defineAdminAuthToken 
!define expectedUpdateResult {OK}

!define FITNESSE_RECORD_TYPE_UPDATE_inArchive {!-{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"ignoreOverwriteProtection","value":"true"},{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseRecordTypeId}!-"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"recordType"}],"name":"validationType"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"recordType"}],"name":"type"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"pluralTextId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"defTextId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseGroupId}!-"}],"name":"metadataId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"search"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchId}!-"}],"name":"search"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnessePGroupId}!-"}],"name":"presentationViewId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnessePGroupId}!-"}],"name":"menuPresentationViewId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnessePGroupId}!-"}],"name":"listPresentationViewId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnessePGroupId}!-"}],"name":"autocompletePresentationView"},{"name":"public","value":"false"},{"name":"idSource","value":"sequence"},{"name":"storeInArchive","value":"true"},{"repeatId":"0","name":"groupOfRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"usePermissionUnit","value":"false"},{"name":"useTrashBin","value":"false"},{"name":"useVisibility","value":"false"},{"name":"useHostRecordForPermissions","value":"false"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"sequence"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseSequenceId}!-"}],"name":"sequence"}],"name":"recordType"}-!}
!| RecordEndpointFixture |
| authToken       | type       | id                 | json                                     | testUpdateRecord? | getStatusType? |
| $adminAuthToken | recordType | ${fitnesseRecordTypeId} | ${FITNESSE_RECORD_TYPE_UPDATE_inArchive} |                   | OK             |

*!
